title: Technip Energies Awarded Major Contract for Blue Point Number One ATR, the World's Largest Low-Carbon Ammonia Production Facility
content: Technip Energies has been awarded a majorÂ contract by Blue Point Number One, a joint venture between CF Industries, JERA, and MITSUI & CO, for the Blue Point Number One ATR Project in Donaldsonville, Louisiana. This project aims to deliver the world's largest low-carbon ammonia plant with a capacity of approximately 1.4 million metric tons per year.
author: Analysts Account
